_comment: Layer 1 absolute floor for developer-domain metrics. S108-005: ranking winner = code_token tokenizer (default). mode stays 'warn' until ci-run-manifest emits 'dev_workflow_recall'. Flip via env HARNESS_MEM_DEVDOMAIN_GATE=enforce; rollback via HARNESS_MEM_DEVDOMAIN_GATE=warn. Bilingual floor relaxed 0.90→0.88 to match S108-004 measured (0.88).
